page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features a dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY processor with 32 physical cores and 32 vCPUs running at a clock speed of 3.1 GHz. The system is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying on external storage solutions and network-attached disks. Network connectivity is supported by a 10 Gbps baseline bandwidth.

In benchmark evaluations, the instance demonstrates solid mid-range performance. The Intel Xeon processor achieves a stress-ng single-core score of 1436.69 and a multi-core score of 30656.07. Memory subsystem performance is characterized by a read-only small-block cached bandwidth of 1704.61 GB/sec, while large-block uncached read and write bandwidths reach 112.52 GB/sec and 49.63 GB/sec respectively. For database workloads, the instance handles 28.86 million Redis SET operations per second and scores 11530.5 on PassMark database operations.

Lacking local storage and GPU hardware, this instance is not designed for local disk-intensive I/O or heavy graphics and deep learning training. However, its high memory density and dedicated CPU allocation offer qualitative cost efficiency for memory-bound enterprise workloads. It is highly suitable for in-memory databases like Redis, caching layers, large-scale data processing, and enterprise applications requiring substantial memory capacity without the overhead of local NVMe storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring a dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY processor with 32 physical cores and 32 vCPUs running at 3.1 GHz. Equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, it delivers a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core, making it highly suitable for memory-intensive workloads. The instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying instead on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. In benchmark testing, it demonstrates reliable performance with a stress-ng multi-core score of 30656.07 and a Redis SET throughput of 28.86 million operations per second. This hardware profile is optimized for in-memory databases, caching layers, and enterprise applications requiring substantial memory capacity and dedicated compute resources.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 10 Gbps network bandwidth, ideal for in-memory databases and caching.

tagline: A dedicated memory-optimized instance featuring high RAM-to-CPU density and robust memory bandwidth for demanding database and caching workloads.
